description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs apt-transport-https, adds the sbt Debian repository with echo "deb http://dl.bintray.com/sbt/debian /" | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list, imports the GPG key via apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv 642AC823, updates apt again, installs sbt, and verifies the sbt version with sbt sbt-version. Define a test job in the default test stage that executes sbt clean test. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
